tool_output.output:
Based on the provided text, Meta does not disclose **Monthly Active Users (MAUs)**. Instead, the company reports its user base using the **Family daily active people (DAP)** metric. 

According to the filing, the Family DAP was **3.58 billion** on average for December 2025, representing a 7% increase year-over-year.
